title.purpose: Section headings, paired with mono index number.

label.purpose: Dates, tech chips, nav index numbers, logo, footer credit.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow at rest (Tailwind shadow-sm).

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Card hover state (Tailwind shadow-lg), paired with a small -translate-y lift.

shadows.name: showcase-hover
shadows.purpose: Featured Projects media card hover only (Tailwind shadow-2xl).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default Tailwind transition easing for hover/color/shadow state changes.

motion.name: dot-accent-fade
motion.purpose: Cursor-revealed teal dot-grid layer opacity transition.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill CTA with a solid-color wipe that slides in from the left on hover.
components.html: Get In Touch
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--primary)); padding: 12px 28px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 14px; color: hsl(var(--primary)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary-fill { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: hsl(var(--primary)); transform: translateX(-100%); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary-label { position: relative; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { color: hsl(var(--primary-foreground)); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-primary-fill { transform: translateX(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(var(--primary)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Mono index + label pill; active state is a scroll-spy-driven tinted fill.
components.html: 01.About02.Education
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: hsl(var(--foreground)); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: hsl(var(--primary)); background-color: hsl(var(--primary) / 0.08); } .ds-nav-link-index { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: hsl(var(--primary)); margin-right: 4px; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Bordered card with a faint top accent bar that brightens on hover. Used for Education timeline entries.
components.html:
Bachelor of Engineering

Computer Engineering and Digital Technology
components.css: .ds-card-standard { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); background-color: hsl(var(--card)); padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-standard-accent { position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 4px; background: linear-gradient(to right, hsl(var(--primary) / 0.4), hsl(var(--primary)), transparent); opacity: 0.4; transition: opacity 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-standard-title { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: hsl(var(--foreground)); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-standard-body { font-size: 14px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); } .ds-card-standard:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-color: hsl(var(--primary) / 0.2); } .ds-card-standard:hover .ds-card-standard-accent { opacity: 1; }

components.name: Media Card
components.description: Borderless, shadow-only card reserved for the Featured Projects screenshot.
components.css: .ds-card-media { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 28px; background-color: hsl(var(--card)); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transition: box-shadow 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-media-img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-media:hover { box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); } .ds-card-media:hover .ds-card-media-img { transform: scale(1.05); }

components.name: Certificate Card
components.description: Compact card with a circular tinted icon badge, denser than the standard card.
components.html:
NAT Olympic Applied Math Camp 2023

Office of National Academic Test Program · Oct 2023
components.css: .ds-card-cert { border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border) / 0.6); background-color: hsl(var(--card)); padding: 24px; transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-cert-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: hsl(var(--primary) / 0.1); color: hsl(var(--primary)); margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-card-cert-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: hsl(var(--foreground)); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-cert-meta { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; color: hsl(var(--primary)); } .ds-card-cert:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-color: hsl(var(--primary) / 0.3); }

components.name: Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: hsl(var(--secondary)); padding: 4px 10px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: The literal, functional 01–05 index paired with a title and trailing hairline rule.
components.css: .ds-section-heading { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-section-heading-index { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 14px; color: hsl(var(--primary)); } .ds-section-heading-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: hsl(var(--foreground)); } .ds-section-heading-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background-color: hsl(var(--border)); margin-left: 16px; }

narrative.overview: Two layers, always working together. The base layer is a developer's terminal: monospace labels, a literal 01-05 index that cross-references the nav bar section by section, a <dev /> logotype, flat cards with hairline borders. The second layer is an aurora that lives behind and reacts to the visitor — a mouse-reactive dot-grid, a slow-wandering blob glow, and per-card proximity lighting, all rendered in one consistent teal. Neither layer performs alone: the terminal without the aurora is a dry resume; the aurora without the terminal is a tech demo with no substance behind it. Together they say "I build interactive frontend, and this page is the proof," aimed squarely at a recruiter doing a 30-second scan. The palette is deliberately restrained — a warm-ivory neutral base (chosen over a colder pure white specifically for warmth without sacrificing the technical read) and one teal accent, never more than one saturated color live on screen at once. The playful interactivity (glow, magnetic hover, the typewriter role line) is the flex; it never gets in the way of the actual content a recruiter needs to read. This system explicitly rejects the SaaS-landing-page toolkit: no gradient text as decoration, no colored side-stripe borders on cards, no identical card grid used for genuinely different content types, no rainbow/neon color cycling.
keyCharacteristics: One teal, two representations: Signal Teal for interactive UI, Aurora Teal for ambient effects.
A literal, functional numbered index (01-05) — not decorative eyebrows.
Elevation is a hover response, not baseline depth.
Card surfaces are deliberately varied by section so the page doesn't read as one repeated template.
Monospace exclusively for metadata — never for body prose.

rules.name: The One Teal Rule
rules.body: Exactly one saturated hue exists in this system. If a new accent color is needed for anything, reach for a tint/shade of teal before introducing a second hue.

rules.name: The Warmth-Isn't-Cream Rule
rules.body: Warm Ivory is a background tone that exists specifically because Pure White cards sit on top of it. Don't let the warm neutral migrate onto cards or surfaces.

rules.name: The Mono-Never-Prose Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for metadata. It never carries a sentence of body copy.

rules.name: The Touch-to-Lift Rule
rules.body: No card gets a resting shadow heavier than shadow-sm. If something needs to look important at rest, use size or position, not elevation.

dos: Do keep exactly one saturated hue (teal) in the system.
Do vary card surface treatment by content type rather than reusing one card shape everywhere.
Do reserve monospace for metadata only.
Do treat the 01-05 section numbers as a literal index synced to the Navbar.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient background) — known current exception in the Hero role line that should be fixed on a future pass.
Don't use a colored side-stripe border on cards — tried and reverted during development.
Don't reuse one identical card grid for genuinely different content.
Don't introduce a second saturated hue or a rainbow/neon color-cycling effect.
Don't let the warm-ivory background bleed onto card surfaces.
